channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 73-Year-Old American Killed in Negros Oriental Attack
item.description: A 73-year-old American was fatally shot inside his residence in Sibulan, Negros Oriental, on Sunday, according to police reports. The incident occurred when three masked men entered the victim's home ...

item.title: Sacha Baron Cohen Revisits Ali G at Wimbledon Amid New Film Rumors
item.description: Sacha Baron Cohen made a surprise appearance as Ali G at Wimbledon's men's singles final, sparking speculation about a new film. The comedian, known for his satirical character, donned his signature y...

item.title: Limp Bizkit and Tom Green collaborate on 'Rollin'' during Ottawa Bluesfest performance
item.description: Limp Bizkit performed at Ottawa Bluesfest, featuring a nostalgic collaboration with comedian Tom Green. The nu-metal band brought Green onstage for a rendition of their iconic 2000 single 'Rollin' (Ai...

item.title: Zanzibar's Cultural Heritage as Economic Driver
item.description: The Zanzibar government has outlined plans to harness the island's rich cultural heritage as a key strategy for economic growth. Officials highlight the importance of leveraging unique cultural assets...

item.title: White House Aides Discuss Strategic Shifts in National Security Leadership
item.description: The article examines discussions within the Trump administration regarding potential changes to national security leadership following the departure of retired General John McCain. Key figures like Se...

item.title: Alberta, Ottawa and Oil Companies Advance Carbon Capture Project
item.description: The Alberta government, Ottawa, and five major oilsands producers have signed a memorandum of understanding to advance the multibillion-dollar Pathways carbon capture and storage project. This initiat...

item.title: Oil prices rise on Hormuz tensions as global markets decline
item.description: Global oil prices surged 7.8% to $81.92 per barrel after the US and Iran claimed control of the Strait of Hormuz, disrupting oil shipments and driving up fuel costs. The ASX is expected to fall 0.1%, ...

item.title: South Africa's Struggle Against Mandrax Trafficking and Law Enforcement Challenges
item.description: The article discusses recent significant seizures of Mandrax (methaqualone) by South African authorities, highlighting the complexities of combating drug trafficking. A major seizure of over 700 kg at...

item.title: Emmerdale star E Lisa Riley marks 50th birthday with nostalgic Fat Friends memories
item.description: The article highlights the milestone birthday of E Lisa Riley, a long-standing character from the British soap opera Emmerdale, as celebrated by her co-star Ruth Jones. The piece includes throwback ph...

item.title: Federal Judge Orders Review of Trump's Legal Settlement Amid Controversy
item.description: A federal judge has ruled that the controversial settlement between former President Donald Trump and the U.S. Department of Justice is invalid, ordering its removal from all official proceedings. The...

item.title: Mayon Volcano Continues 189-Day Lava Eruption with New Activity
item.description: The Mayon Volcano in Albay erupted again, releasing lava that flowed toward the gullies of Basud, Bonga, and Mi-isi. According to the Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology (Phivolcs), a l...

item.title: Boko Haram uses AI tools to plan attacks, report reveals
item.description: A new report shows Boko Haram and ISWAP fighters in Nigeria are using AI platforms like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok, and DeepSeek to plan attacks. Former members told researchers they used these too...

item.title: Kanga Cup 2026: Challenges and Growth as Tournament Hits Capacity in Canberra
item.description: The Kanga Cup, Australia's largest youth football tournament in the southern hemisphere, has reached full capacity for the 2026 edition, with 4444 players registered and an expected $7.5 million econo...

item.title: Senators Leave Court During Impeachment Trial, Reducing Observers
item.description: During a 6-hour impeachment trial session, some senators left the court, leading to a noticeable decrease in the number of observers present. The event, reported by ABS-CBN News on July 14, 2026, high...

item.title: Global Markets Experience Shifts Amid Economic Uncertainties
item.description: Global markets are undergoing significant changes as investors adapt to evolving economic conditions. Key factors include fluctuating commodity prices, currency volatility, and regional market perform...

item.title: AEGIS: A self-hosted AI orchestration platform for personal workflow automation
item.description: Mohammed Arshad Ansari has open-sourced AEGIS, a self-hosted AI orchestration platform designed to streamline personal workflows. The system, built for a single user, automates repetitive tasks like e...

item.title: Car Accident on R23 Highway Claims Three Lives, Injures One
item.description: A light motor vehicle rolled multiple times on the R23 highway near Tsakane in Ekurhuleni, resulting in three fatalities and one critical injury. The incident occurred on the southbound carriageway be...

item.title: Returnees Struggle with Recovery Challenges in Sudan's Khartoum
item.description: Over 2 million Sudanese residents have returned to Khartoum since the army recaptured the city from paramilitary forces, but recovery remains slow. Returnees face power outages, damaged infrastructure...

item.title: Jay-Z Concert at Yankee Stadium Delayed Due to Fans Without Tickets Rushing Entrances
item.description: The original article discusses the unexpected delay of Jay-Z's concert at Yankee Stadium, which was caused by a surge of fans without valid tickets attempting to enter the venue. This incident led to ...

item.title: Shawn Pomrenke's Gold Mining Success and Business Ventures
item.description: Shawn Pomrenke, a prominent figure in Alaska's gold dredging industry, has built a successful career both as a miner and a TV personality on the Discovery Channel's Bering Sea Gold. His net worth, tho...
